CytokineProfileShinyApp 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Changelog

Tutorials for Using CytokineProfile Shiny

Source: TUTORIALS.md

Installation

Choose this when you want to run the application locally from R.

  • Running the CytokineProfile Shiny App Locally

Getting Started

Choose this when you are new to the app and want a guided walkthrough of the main workflow.

  • Basic Tutorial of CytokineProfile Shiny

Univariate Testing Guides

Choose these when your main goal is formal cytokine-by-cytokine testing rather than multivariate pattern discovery.

Start here if you are not sure which testing branch fits the study design:

  • Understanding Univariate Test Selection

Choose this when one factor has more than two levels or when you need the app’s one-way, two-way, or ANCOVA workflows explained in more detail:

  • Understanding Multi-Level Univariate Analysis

Exploratory Analysis Guides

Choose these when your goal is to inspect distributions, group summaries, effect-size screens, correlation structure, or clustering before moving into more formal modeling.

Choose this when you want to see raw distribution shape, spread, and possible outliers before picking a statistical test:

  • Understanding Boxplots and Violin Plots

Choose this when you want compact group summaries with uncertainty bars across many cytokines:

  • Understanding Error-Bar Plots

Choose this when you want two-group differential screening with fold-change and p-value emphasis:

  • Understanding Volcano Plot

Choose this when you want two-group effect-size screening with SSMD plus fold-change thresholds:

  • Understanding Dual-Flashlight Plot

Choose this when you want unsupervised clustering or a matrix-style overview of many samples and cytokines:

  • Understanding Heatmaps

Choose this when your main question is about coordinated behavior among numeric variables rather than mean differences:

  • Understanding Correlation Analysis

Multivariate Analysis Guides

Choose these when you want to understand overall cytokine-profile structure, supervised separation, or multivariable prediction.

Choose this when you want an unsupervised first look at overall structure:

  • Understanding PCA

Choose this when you want to predict one numeric outcome from many cytokines:

  • Understanding PLSR

Choose this when you want supervised class separation for one study or batch:

  • Understanding (s)PLS-DA

Choose this when you need supervised class separation across multiple studies or batches:

  • Understanding MINT sPLS-DA

Machine Learning Guides

Choose these when classification performance and feature importance are the main goals.

  • Understanding Random Forest
  • Understanding XGBoost

On this page

Developed by Shubh Saraswat, Xiaohua Douglas Zhang.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
